perks.summary: generate a LabArchives config.yaml (api_url + credentials) from env vars (local, read-only)
list all notebooks accessible to the authenticated user (read-only remote)
download a full notebook backup (XML/JSON/7z) to a file (read-only remote)
create a new entry in a notebook (mutates the remote ELN)
upload a file attachment to an existing entry (mutates the remote ELN)
add a comment to an existing entry (mutates the remote ELN)
